old_example: The company is working hard to eliminate all technical defects and improve the overall quality of its international technology products today.
new_example: The company is working to eliminate all technical defects.
new_translation: Công ty đang nỗ lực loại bỏ mọi lỗi kỹ thuật.

old_example: The luxury international hotel has an elite clientele that includes several famous global celebrities and wealthy international businesspeople annually today.
new_example: The luxury hotel has an elite clientele of famous celebrities.
new_translation: Khách sạn sang trọng có lượng khách hàng thượng lưu là các ngôi sao.

old_example: The architect decided to use a unique elliptical design for the company's new regional headquarters building in the busy city center area.
new_example: The architect used a unique elliptical design for the new building.
new_translation: Kiến trúc sư dùng thiết kế hình elip độc đáo cho tòa nhà mới.

old_example: The park is famous for its centuries-old elm trees that provide shade to visitors.
new_example: The park is famous for its old elm trees.
new_translation: Công viên nổi tiếng với những cây đu cổ thụ.

old_example: The CEO gave an eloquent speech regarding the company's future international growth and expansion project during the annual shareholders' meeting yesterday.
new_example: The CEO gave an eloquent speech during the annual shareholders' meeting.
new_translation: CEO đã có bài phát biểu hùng hồn tại đại hội cổ đông.

old_example: The cause of the sudden technical failure remained elusive until the software engineers conducted a thorough and intensive system audit yesterday morning.
new_example: The cause of the technical failure remained elusive for several days.
new_translation: Nguyên nhân của lỗi kỹ thuật vẫn khó xác định trong vài ngày.

old_example: The company is about to embark on a major expansion plan into the European market.
new_example: The company is about to embark on a major expansion plan.
new_translation: Công ty sắp sửa bắt đầu một kế hoạch mở rộng lớn.

old_example: To avoid any potential embarrassment during the formal dinner, she spent some time studying the traditional etiquette of the host country.
new_example: To avoid embarrassment, she studied the etiquette of the host country.
new_translation: Để tránh bối rối, cô đã nghiên cứu nghi lễ của nước chủ nhà.

old_example: The eagle has long been emblematic of strength and freedom in many different cultures around the world.
new_example: The eagle is emblematic of strength and freedom in many cultures.
new_translation: Đại bàng là biểu tượng cho sức mạnh và tự do ở nhiều nơi.

old_example: The traditional wedding dress was decorated with intricate gold embroidery, which had been handcrafted by skilled local artisans over several months.
new_example: The traditional wedding dress was decorated with intricate gold embroidery.
new_translation: Chiếc váy cưới truyền thống được trang trí bằng họa tiết thêu vàng.

old_example: The emergence of several new competitive startups in the renewable energy sector has forced the traditional oil giants to accelerate their transition to green power.
new_example: The emergence of new startups forced oil giants to transition to green power.
new_translation: Sự xuất hiện của các công ty khởi nghiệp buộc các tập đoàn dầu mỏ chuyển đổi.

old_example: He sent a smiling emoji to show that he was only joking about missing the party.
new_example: He sent a smiling emoji to show he was only joking.
new_translation: Anh ta đã gửi một biểu tượng mỉm cười để cho thấy mình chỉ đùa.
